content.text:
There are no review comments from a human reviewer on PR #36. The only review is from the Gemini Code Assist bot, which commented "I have no feedback to provide."

Let me check if there are any pending review threads or requested changes I might be missing.

input.command: gh pr view 36 --json reviews,reviewRequests,state,mergeable,statusCheckRollup --jq '{state, reviews: [.reviews[] | {author: .author.login, state: .state}], reviewRequests: .reviewRequests, mergeable}'
